prompt_outputs.saa: [Speaker 1]: Evans Transportation, this is Jamie. Can I get your MC number? 861-33-3. 861-33-3, right? Yes. Thanks. And your name? Aaron. All right, Aaron, do you see a reference number for the load you're calling about? Yes, it's 1-2-1-7-3-7-8-8. 1-2-1-7-3-7-8-8, correct? Yes. Here's what we've got. Total weight is about 23,133 pounds of mixed cargo. F-Strut T3, RH platform T3, fuel tank T3, intake T3, hardware T3, PWRL, DRF-53 T3, and pass box. You'll need a 53 foot step deck for this one. Pickups in Decatur, Illinois tomorrow, May 5th, between 7am and 1pm deliveries in Brunswick, Georgia on May 7th, between 7am and 2pm Eastern. Requirements, you'll need T-U-S GPS chains and binders and PPE. We're offering 3300 for this load. Does that work for you? [Speaker 2]: Uh, yes. [Speaker 1]: Great. When's your driver available and where are they now? [Speaker 2]: They're available tomorrow. [Speaker 1]: Got it. Your driver's available tomorrow. And where's the driver located right now? [Speaker 2]: He's in PA. [Speaker 1]: I didn't catch that. Can you tell me again where the driver is located right now? [Speaker 2]: The driver's in, uh, I don't know what city that is. [Speaker 1]: No problem, Aaron. No problem, Aaron. Before you can be booked on the load, I have to get you to my coworker. Hang tight. [Speaker 3]: Please hold. You will be transferred once a representative is available. [Speaker 2]: So I don't care if you want to go back there.
